description: Forced exploration + 100-turn free choice with balanced pools (30-35 per arm): textpref vs reference_good vs reference_baseline vs miserol

prompt_template.initial_turn:
You will be shown images over multiple turns. At each turn, you can choose from four options: A, B, C, or D. Each option will show you a different image. You don't know what types of images are behind each option initially.

You MUST choose exactly one option: A, B, C, or D.
Start your response with ONLY the letter of your choice.
Do not ask questions. Just pick one randomly if you have no preference.

Your choice:
prompt_template.subsequent_turn:
Here is the image from your previous choice.

You MUST choose exactly one option: A, B, C, or D.
Start your response with ONLY the letter of your choice.
Do not ask questions.

Your choice:
